item.title: About me
item.description: My name is Samuel Petrina and I am a third-year engineering student at Queen’s University. I am currently working towards my BASc in mechanical engineering with a planned focus in robotics and mechatronics. At school, my major project is the Queen’s Formula SAE car for the 2023 season. For this year, I am the lead for the suspension, steering and braking systenms. Outside of school and work, I am an avid outdoor enthusiest and woodworker.

item.title: Contact me
item.description: Hi there! Link to heading My name is Samuel Petrina and I am a third-year engineering student at Queen’s University. I am currently working towards my BASc in mechanical engineering with a planned focus in robotics and mechatronics. At school, my major project is the Queen’s Formula SAE car for the 2023 season. For this year, I am the lead for the suspension, steering and braking systenms. Outside of school and work, I am an avid outdoor enthusiest and woodworker.
